name: Charger Metals NL
description: Charger Metals NL is an Australian exploration company focused on discovering and developing high-grade battery metals, particularly lithium and nickel-copper-PGE. The company's key projects include the Bynoe Lithium Project in the Northern Territory, which is located in a premier lithium-producing province, and the Lake Johnston Lithium and Coates Projects in Western Australia. Charger Metals aims to supply the growing global demand for green energy materials through targeted exploration and strategic joint ventures.
